name: Madeleines
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon orange flower water or orange extract
1 stick unsalted butter, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Break the eggs with a whisk. Beat in sugar slowly until creamy, then add orange flower water or extract. Mix well by hand until frothy.
3. Sift flour into batter alternately with melted, cooled butter. Fold gently to combine.
4. Butter Madeleine pans and fill about 2/3 full with batter.
5. Bake for approximately 10 minutes.
6. Remove Madeleines from pans immediately after baking. Allow to cool completely before dusting with confectioners' sugar.
